2606.31470.title: CLOUDADV: Decision-Aligned Instance Sizing with Zero-Shot Foundation Models under Drift
2606.31470.paper_summary: Cloud virtual machines are often overprovisioned, creating avoidable cost and operational inefficiency. We present CLOUDADV, an interactive engineer-facing advisory system for cloud instance sizing under workload drift. The system combines zero-shot time-series forecasting with bounded recommendation generation across day-, week-, and month-scale planning horizons. For each query, CLOUDADV constructs a structured decision context from historical utilization, forecast summaries, current VM metadata, candidate instance options, pricing, and explicit sizing heuristics. A higher-capacity LLM is used offline to generate reference recommendations, while a smaller production model is evaluated on the same prompts to assess deployment-time alignment under latency and cost constraints. Evaluation prioritizes downstream recommendation quality using simulated Azure cost savings and ex-post exceedance, with rolling-origin forecast accuracy reported as a secondary diagnostic against classical and supervised baselines. In a case study of seven production VMs, the reference recommendations reduce simulated monthly cost from about \$1,503 to \$708, yielding \$795/month in savings (52.9%) under conservative heuristic constraints, while the highest observed exceedance rate among downgraded cases is 1.5%. Although Chronos-2 does not minimize every forecasting metric, it often induces recommendation patterns similar to those of a supervised per-VM baseline. These results suggest that zero-shot foundation models can support decision-aligned provisioning in non-stationary cloud environments while reducing the operational burden of repeated per-tenant retraining, revalidation, and redeployment.
2606.31470.paper_summary_zh: 雲端虛擬機器經常被過度配置，造成可避免的成本和操作效率低下。我們提出了CLOUDADV，這是一個面向工程師的互動諮詢系統，用於在工作負載漂移下進行雲實例大小調整。該系統結合了零樣本時間序列預測與在日、週和月規模規劃範圍內的有界建議生成。對於每個查詢，CLOUDADV根據歷史利用率、預測摘要、當前虛擬機元數據、候選實例選項、定價和明確的大小啟發式構建結構化決策上下文。離線使用更高容量的LLM生成參考建議，同時在相同提示上評估較小的生產模型，以評估在延遲和成本約束下的部署時間對齊。評估優先考慮下游建議質量，使用模擬的Azure成本節省和事後超出情況，並報告滾動起源預測準確性作為對經典和監督基準的次要診斷。在七個生產虛擬機的案例研究中，參考建議將模擬的每月成本從約\$1,503降低到\$708，在保守的啟發式約束下實現每月\$795的節省（52.9%），而在降級案例中觀察到的最高超出率為1.5%。儘管Chronos-2並未最小化每個預測指標，但它經常產生類似於監督每虛擬機基準的建議模式。這些結果表明，零樣本基礎模型可以支持在非穩態雲環境中與決策對齊的配置，同時減少重複每租戶再訓練、再驗證和再部署的操作負擔。
2606.31470.author: Jack Bell et.al.
2606.31470.authors: Jack Bell, Giacomo Carfi, Gerlando Gramaglia, Andrea Simioni, Daniele Fontani, Vincenzo Lomonaco
